items.label: Gamunjangagi
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 삼공본풀이
items.subtitle: Hidden fortune and self-recognition.
paragraphs: A figure who names the hidden source of her own life before others can recognise it.

items.label: Hallakgungi
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 이공본풀이
items.subtitle: Return after harm and restoration through force.
paragraphs: A figure who returns after violence with the power to destroy, revive, and restore.

items.label: Chogong Three Brothers
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 초공본풀이
items.subtitle: Role transition and ritual responsibility.
paragraphs: A path of ordinary success is interrupted by ritual demand, forcing life into another structure.

items.label: Yu Jeongseung's Daughter
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 초공본풀이
items.subtitle: Calling, initiation, and pressure into ritual role.
paragraphs: A figure moved out of ordinary life and into ritual function through pressure, illness, and transmission.

items.label: Myeongjinguk's Daughter
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 삼승할망본풀이
items.subtitle: Safe arrival and the protection of life.
paragraphs: A figure who gives birth its proper passage and protects life as it enters the world.

items.label: Donghae Yonggung's Daughter
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 삼승할망본풀이
items.subtitle: Failed birth-power and unsafe arrival.
paragraphs: A figure who can bring conception but cannot secure safe passage into life.

items.label: Yeosan Buin
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 문전본풀이
items.subtitle: Domestic care and the sustaining warmth of the household.
paragraphs: A figure of feeding, tending, household survival, and the everyday work that keeps life intact.

items.label: Nokdisaengi
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 문전본풀이
items.subtitle: Household rupture and the recovery of relational order.
paragraphs: A figure tied to broken family structure, detection, and the restoration of household order.

items.label: Chilseong Agi
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 칠성본풀이
items.subtitle: Receiving the strange force that becomes household wealth.
paragraphs: A rejected and feared force that becomes protection and abundance when properly received.

items.label: Samani
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 멩감본풀이 or 사만이본풀이
items.subtitle: Care for the neglected dead and protection through acknowledgement.
paragraphs: A figure who receives what others abandon and turns neglected death into protection and continuity.

items.label: Wongang Ami
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 이공본풀이
items.subtitle: Dignity under oppression and the cost that calls return.
paragraphs: A figure whose suffering becomes the moral ground for return, judgement, and restoration.

items.label: Noga Danpung Agissi
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 초공본풀이
items.subtitle: Origin-cost and the body that carries a future structure.
paragraphs: A figure whose suffering and body become the ground from which a later ritual order can emerge.

items.label: Gangnim
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 차사본풀이
items.subtitle: Procedure, death-crossing, and hidden cause.
paragraphs: A figure who crosses into the underworld to retrieve the missing order behind death.

items.label: Jijang Agissi
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 지장본풀이
items.subtitle: Mourning, passage, and ritual care for the dead.
paragraphs: A figure who lives through repeated loss and turns grief into passage for the dead.

items.label: Sobyeolwang
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 천지왕본풀이
items.subtitle: Crooked order and the flawed structure of the living world.
paragraphs: A figure whose trickery explains why this world carries disorder, conflict, and imperfection.

items.label: Daebyeolwang
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 천지왕본풀이
items.subtitle: Law, separation, and world-order.
paragraphs: A figure of clean order, separation, and the placement of worlds into their proper structure.

items.label: Daebyeolsang Manura
items.title: Your Bonpuri: 마누라본풀이
items.subtitle: Disease-power and dangerous force brought into order.
paragraphs: A figure of illness, threat, and the force that must be negotiated into a workable place.
